title: [codereview] Use rx_channel instead of current_channel in lichen_announce_view per standardization epic project-LICHEN-dp4j
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/include/lichen/routing/announce.h:40 and announce.c:245,128 use current_channel but epic specifies rx_channel for consistency with spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md and Rust/Python. Tag: codereview. Discovered during implementation of project-LICHEN-ckub.
close_reason: Fixed by renaming to rx_channel in header, parse, build_signed_data, scheduler, gateway view/parse, test. Matches standardization epic and spec. 3 clean codereview passes completed with no further findings on this change.
